entities.name: SOYBEAN
entities.description: Glycine max L. Merr., the crop studied for productivity and yield gaps in India

entities.name: CROPGRO-SOYBEAN MODEL
entities.description: A simulation model used to calibrate, validate, and estimate potential yields and yield gaps

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the soybean yield analysis was conducted

entities.name: CENTRAL AND PENINSULAR INDIA
entities.description: The specific regions in India where the CROPGRO-Soybean model was calibrated and validated

entities.name: POTENTIAL YIELD
entities.description: The maximum yield achievable under specific water conditions, either non-limiting or limiting

entities.name: YIELD GAP
entities.description: The difference between potential yields and actual yields of soybean

entities.name: WATER NON-LIMITING
entities.description: A condition where water availability does not restrict crop yield

entities.name: WATER LIMITING
entities.description: A condition where water availability restricts crop yield

entities.name: ACTUAL YIELD
entities.description: The real yield achieved by farmers in rainfed environments

entities.name: SOIL MOISTURE
entities.description: The condition of water in the soil that can reduce potential yield

entities.name: SOLAR RADIATION
entities.description: Environmental factor strongly correlated with water non-limiting potential yields

entities.name: CROP SEASON RAINFALL
entities.description: The amount of precipitation during the growing season affecting yields and yield gaps

entities.name: RAINFED ENVIRONMENT
entities.description: An agricultural setting where crops are grown without irrigation, relying on rainfall

entities.name: IMPROVED CROP MANAGEMENT PRACTICES
entities.description: Agricultural techniques that can be adopted to reduce the yield gap

entities.name: CONSERVATION OF RAINFALL
entities.description: A technology aimed at reducing yield gaps in low rainfall regimes

entities.name: DROUGHT RESISTANCE
entities.description: A trait of soybean varieties used to reduce yield gaps in low rainfall regimes

entities.name: WATER-LOGGING
entities.description: A condition of excess soil water that negatively impacts crop yield

entities.name: WATER-LOGGING TOLERANCE
entities.description: A trait of soybean varieties used to reduce yield gaps in high rainfall regimes

entities.name: SUPPLEMENTAL IRRIGATION
entities.description: The practice of using harvested excess rainfall to increase crop yields

relationships.description: component to reduce in low rainfall
component to reduce in high rainfall
